data.title: CAIXA: RECURRING NET INCOME OF R$15.5 BILLION IN 2025, REPRESENTING YEAR-OVER-YEAR GROWTH OF 10.4%
data.description: In Brazil's capital, Brasília, CAIXA, the country's top bank in terms of client base, credit portfolio, and savings deposits, has unveiled its financial performance for 2025. The key points include: I. A Recurring Net Income of R$15.5 billion for the year, marking a 10.4% increase from the previous year; II. Accounting Net…

data.title: Smartee Deepens European Footprint and Showcases Integrated Mandibular Advancement Repositioning Technology at ALIGNEA 2026
data.description: In Salamanca, Spain, on March 5, 2026, Smartee Denti-Technology, a leading global provider of clear aligner solutions, highlighted its dedication to the European market at the 11th International Congress of Aligners (ALIGNEA) between February 19-21. The event served as a platform for the company to demonstrate its latest innovations and emphasize its continued support for the industry.
